final:
module shift_register (  
    input wire rst,  
    input wire reset,  
    input wire load,  
    input wire shift,  
    input wire [31:0] data_in,  
    output reg [31:0] data_out  
);  
    always @(posedge rst or posedge reset) begin  
        if (reset) begin  
            data_out <= 32'b0;  
        end else if (load) begin  
            data_out <= data_in;  
        end else if (shift) begin  
            data_out <= {1'b0, data_out[31:1]};  
        end  
    end  
endmodule
